heading: What BLOOM is
introParagraph: BLOOM is a nonprofit. Our tools are free.
supportLine: We work with civic leaders — organizers, community leaders, and institutions — to run public conversations that go beyond talk: surfacing what communities actually think, finding real common ground, and connecting findings to the decisions that matter.

cards.label: CivicOS
cards.desc: A free, open-source platform that supports the full problem solving processes — from setting the agenda to reporting what was heard

cards.label: Civic Hosts
cards.desc: A network of trained community leaders who run and steward local deliberations

cards.label: Headline Deliberations
cards.desc: Large-scale pilots run directly by BLOOM that demonstrate what’s possible and develop the model
